targets.query:
SELECT SUM(_sample_interval) AS total_events FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob1 IN ($event),, $event)

  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob1 IN ($event),, $event)

targets.query:
SELECT SUM(IF(double1 > 0, _sample_interval * double1, 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(IF(double1 > 0, _sample_interval, 0)), 0) AS avg_duration_ms FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob1 IN ($event),, $event)

targets.query:
SELECT $timeSeries AS t, blob1 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) / $interval_s AS rps FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob1 IN ($event),, $event) GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t

targets.query:
SELECT blob1 AS event, SUM(_sample_interval) AS count FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)

targets.query:
SELECT timestamp, blob12 AS fly_region, blob13 AS action FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob1 IN ($event),, $event) AND blob1 = 'region.capacity_eviction' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

targets.query:
SELECT timestamp, blob1 AS event, blob5 AS error, blob8 AS sandbox_id, blob7 AS fly_machine_id, blob12 AS fly_region FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob1 IN ($event),, $event) AND blob5 != '' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
targets.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp, blob1 AS event, blob5 AS error, blob8 AS sandbox_id, blob7 AS fly_machine_id, blob12 AS fly_region FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob1 IN ($event),, $event) AND blob5 != '' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

targets.query:
SELECT timestamp, blob1 AS event, blob9 AS status, blob6 AS fly_app_name, blob7 AS fly_machine_id, blob8 AS sandbox_id, blob13 AS label FROM kiloclaw_events WHERE $timeFilter
  $conditionalTest(AND blob8 = ${sandboxId:sqlstring},, $sandboxId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob2 = ${userId:sqlstring},, $userId)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob3 IN ($delivery),, $delivery)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob1 IN ($event),, $event) AND (blob1 LIKE 'instance.%' OR blob1 LIKE 'reconcile.%') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

  $conditionalTest(AND blob12 IN ($flyRegion),, $flyRegion)
  $conditionalTest(AND blob1 IN ($event),, $event) AND (blob1 LIKE 'instance.%' OR blob1 LIKE 'reconcile.%') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
